subcodes.title: Words to departing pilgrims, spoken on 1914-06-09
subcodes.first_line: May you be ever under the protection of the Merciful One!... After His Holiness Christ, His Apostles did not rest for one moment.
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @apostles; early disciples of Christ, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
